creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
While trying to upgrade a RELENG11 box to 12.0 ALPHA5, I had to backout the change as disks off an 9420 controller no longer work.  The kernel would not boot as it would hang on timeouts.  The same behaviour was seen on the onboard  LSI 3108 MegaRAID on a SuperMicro MB SYS-7048R-C1RT4+
